analyst_briefing: CRISIS regime (VERY HIGH conviction) holds as of 2026-04-21 (-0.68 system average), supported by SA tariff entrenchment (USTR agenda, Section 232 persistence) and CC corroboration (Turnberry 15% lock-in, IMF eurozone 1.1% growth cut on energy risks). All 8 asset classes negative; largest deviations in Bonds (-0.34), Metals/EM Equities (-0.27). Tech MILD NEGATIVE flags TS divergence from US equity records on Hormuz truce—episodic noise lacking SA backing, contradicted by non-US weakness (US bias flagged). Blind spots active (bonds systemic, crypto distrust, energy divergence, tech fiscal) annotate but do not suppress scores. Tail risks: EU tariff convergence erosion (65% likelihood, non-consensus); tariff-energy inflation >6% (45%). ESA flags HIGH on EU trade drag; ERM/SCEM MEDIUM on metals/EM stress. No regime change absent 3+ SA shifts; monitor ratification, USMCA review.
